channel.title: Replay Game News
channel.description: Latest video game news, lore, and analysis

item.title: How Horror Games Have Changed. Why They Feel So Different Today
item.description: Horror games used to be about fear. Today, they are about control, psychology, and survival in a completely different way.

item.title: How The Gaming Industry Is Slowly Eating Its Own Players
item.description: Modern games are no longer just entertainment. They are systems designed to keep you playing, spending, and coming back.

item.title: Why Dante Is Actually A Tragic Character
item.description: Dante looks like the coolest demon hunter alive. But behind the jokes lies a tragic story.

item.title: The Tragic Story of Freya Explained
item.description: Freya’s past is filled with betrayal, curses, and impossible choices.

item.title: Why Joels Decision Changed the Entire World
item.description: One decision inside a hospital changed everything for Ellie and the world.

item.title: Why Baldur Hated His Own Mother
item.description: The tragic reason behind Baldur’s hatred for Freya.

item.title: The Secret Prophecy About Kratos and Loki
item.description: A hidden prophecy that shapes the fate of Kratos and Loki.

item.title: How Grace Ashcroft Accidentally Walked Into the Worst Investigation Ever
item.description: A normal investigation turns into a nightmare in Resident Evil.

item.title: Why Every Resident Evil Building Is Full of Puzzles
item.description: Why do Resident Evil buildings always contain strange puzzles?

item.title: Jill Valentine: The Woman Chased by Nemesis More Than Anyone in Gaming History
item.description: Jill Valentine may hold the record for being chased by Nemesis.

item.title: Is Chris Redfield the Strongest Character in Resident Evil?
item.description: Did Chris Redfield really punch a boulder?

item.title: Why did Leon S. Kennedy always like to kick doors?
item.description: Leon prefers kicking doors instead of opening them.
